title: Calling All Los Angeles Crafters
excerpt: It may sound a bit strange, but I haven't actually taught a creative class in Los Angeles (where I have lived for the past 12 years) in a VERY long time. I am so excited to announce that I have…
body: It may sound a bit strange, but I haven't actually taught a creative class in Los Angeles (where I have lived for the past 12 years) in a VERY long time.  I am so excited to announce that I have collaborated with Baum-Kuchen and we are doing a very intimate class in their amazing downtown studio on July 31. We have curated a kit you won't want to miss - a perfect blend of items from Japan along with pieces from my collection. It will be a creative gathering where there will be all kinds of inspiration and hands on fun. Plus you'll get to take home an incredible kit to continue documenting your many adventures. This will be the only class I teach of its' kind this summer, so get your friends together and let's get our creative juices flowing! For more details and to sign up, please visit Baum-Kuchen here.
